states.name: Gemina
states.title: Devoted Timekeeper
states.description:
Deep within the northernmost mountains of Bergaria, an order of secretive priestesses makes their home. Few know of their existence, and even fewer could locate them if pressed. Long ago, Chronos herself gifted their ancestors with power over time, a gift she bestowed only on them. If time magic were to spread among the peoples of Erden, history itself could dissolve into a meaningless paradox.

And so it is the priestesses' duty to watch the flow of time, ever neutral, ever detached from the world. It is a peaceful life, free of worry. Few acolytes find reason to complain.

But Gemina's curiosity was much too great to let her remain an observer.

states.name: Gemina
states.title: Devoted Timekeeper
states.description:
Gemina heard legends as she was growing up. Cautionary tales of a priestesses who ran from the temple and caused untold disaster. Her elders used their tragic fates to scare the acolytes into compliance. Gemina, however, would not be swayed.

She understood the importance of her order's neutrality. Those trusted to oversee time itself had a great responsibility, greater than most in Erden would ever have to face. But how could the guardians of history perform their duty if the world was nothing to them but a collection of sad stories?

That is why she ran away. Gemina escaped the priestesses' temple not to defile her duty, but to embrace its truest purpose.
